content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added domain param parsing in parse() (checked via token.value == 'domain' inside the existing assign branch, no new state added to variables dict, so I did NOT touch the 'if variables:' comma-expectation line), added domain arg to _make_node() (new positional param after num_called_num, generates dgettext/dngettext calls), added _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext factories and dgettext/dngettext plumbing through _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall. If our patches get merged, watch for: _make_node() now has domain as an added trailing positional param (same position style as your metadata dict) and the parse() loop's assign-branch now special-cases token.value=='domain' before the generic variables[...] assignment.

fields.summary: Done: added domain param parsing in parse() (checked via token.value == 'domain' inside the existing assign branch, no new state added to variables dict, so I did NOT touch the 'if variables:' comma-expectation line), added domain arg to _make_node() (new positional param after num_called_num, generates dgettext/dngettext calls), added _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext factories and dgettext/dngettext plumbing through _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall. If our patches get merged, watch for: _make_node() now has domain as an added trailing positional param (same position style as your metadata dict) and the parse() loop's assign-branch now special-cases token.value=='domain' before the generic variables[...] assignment.
